creator: ben.rubson@gmx.com
text:
No more error messages since a few days, even on an empty file as explained above.

What changed are some p5-* packages updated, no more :

pkg: p5-B-Keywords upgraded: 1.15 -> 1.16 
pkg: p5-CGI upgraded: 4.36 -> 4.38 
pkg: p5-DBI upgraded: 1.637 -> 1.639 
pkg: p5-Devel-StackTrace upgraded: 2.02 -> 2.03 
pkg: p5-Digest-SHA upgraded: 5.97 -> 6.01 
pkg: p5-Digest-SHA3 upgraded: 0.26 -> 1.03 
pkg: p5-Exception-Class upgraded: 1.43 -> 1.44 
pkg: p5-HTTP-Message upgraded: 6.13 -> 6.14 
pkg: p5-libwww upgraded: 6.27 -> 6.31 
pkg: p5-Lingua-EN-Inflect upgraded: 1.902 -> 1.903 
pkg: p5-List-MoreUtils upgraded: 0.425 -> 0.428 
pkg: p5-List-MoreUtils-XS upgraded: 0.423 -> 0.428 
pkg: p5-MIME-Types upgraded: 2.13 -> 2.14 
pkg: p5-Module-Runtime upgraded: 0.015 -> 0.016 
pkg: p5-Moo upgraded: 2.003002 -> 2.003004 
pkg: p5-Net-SSLeay upgraded: 1.81 -> 1.82 
pkg: p5-Perl-Tidy upgraded: 20170521 -> 20180101 
pkg: p5-PPIx-Regexp upgraded: 0.037 -> 0.053 
pkg: p5-Role-Tiny upgraded: 2.000005 -> 2.000006 
pkg: p5-Task-Weaken upgraded: 1.04_1 -> 1.05 
pkg: p5-Variable-Magic upgraded: 0.61 -> 0.62 

Perhaps p5-Perl-Tidy was the culprit ?

I then close this ticket for now.
